emrserverless.application.CfnAbout: The `AWS::EMRServerless::Application` resource specifies an EMR Serverless application. An application uses open source analytics frameworks to run jobs that process data. To create an application, you must specify the release version for the open source framework version you want to use and the type of application you want, such as Apache Spark or Apache Hive. After you create an application, you can submit data processing jobs or interactive requests to it.

emrserverless.application.Architecture.Description: The CPU architecture of an application.

emrserverless.application.AutoStartConfi.Description: The configuration for an application to automatically start on job submission.

emrserverless.application.AutoStopConfig.Description: The configuration for an application to automatically stop after a certain amount of time being idle.

emrserverless.application.ImageConfigura.Description: The image configuration applied to all worker types.

emrserverless.application.InitialCapacit.Description: The initial capacity of the application.

emrserverless.application.MaximumCapacit.Description: The maximum capacity of the application. This is cumulative across all workers at any given point in time during the lifespan of the application is created. No new resources will be created once any one of the defined limits is hit.

emrserverless.application.NetworkConfigu.Description: The network configuration for customer VPC connectivity for the application.

emrserverless.application.ReleaseLabel.Description: The Amazon EMR release associated with the application.

emrserverless.application.Tags.Description: The tags assigned to the application.

emrserverless.application.Type.Description: The type of application, such as Spark or Hive.

emrserverless.application.WorkerTypeSpec.Description: The specification applied to each worker type.
